description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a matte black finish and a wooden full stock. The fore-end is ribbed, indicating a pump mechanism for chambering rounds. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, likely steel, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The stock and fore-end are made of dark-stained wood, providing a classic appearance and ergonomic grip. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as law enforcement or civilian defense.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black metal barrel, ribbed fore-end, and dark wooden full stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed pump fore-end, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the fore-end and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the trigger and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
